sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89381" key="prosh/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσήμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἡμέρα</etym>) <sense id="n89381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">happening in one day</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
